productDisplayName: Basics Men Grey Printed Polo T-shirt
description: Composition Grey melange polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short raglan sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed collar with tape detailing on the inseam, navy blue and white panel detailing on the shoulders, rugged chest placket, appliqued football helmet on the upper left chest with embroidered lettering, distressed look printed numbering on the back and a vented hem Fitting Fitted Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Hang dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on print or embroidery The appliqued elements on the chest and printed numbering on the back in classic colours add rugged styling to this polo neck T-shirt from basics, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'11' and shoulders 17.5"
